name: bls-mcp-server
description: Fetch US Bureau of Labor Statistics data — CPI, unemployment, wages, JOLTS, and more via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

BLS_API_KEY.title: BLS API Key
BLS_API_KEY.description: Optional — works without one (25 req/day). With key: 500 req/day + calculations and annual averages. Register free at bls.gov/developers.
